top_hooks.hook: Every single day, thousands of internet gurus tell you how to make money with AI.
99% of people have no idea what's about to happen with AI.
This is your last chance to get rich before AI changes everything.
I'm going to show you how to make time for everything.
There is an incredible piece of software called Claude Code that I've been using for the last 3 months and it has completely and utterly changed my life.
Last year my company's did over $250,000 in aggregate revenue.
If I wanted to start the perfect business, these are the things that I would focus on.
I think rich rich is relative, right?
Okay, most people think that self-respect is something that you earn.
If you're not dedicating probably at least two full days a week to content, you are probably not going to like my content grows better than Charles, too.

top_ideas.summary: This video ranks and details 14 real AI business models, cutting through hype to provide actionable ways to make money in 2026.
top_ideas.title: The Only 14 Ways to Make Money with AI in 2026

top_ideas.summary: This video breaks down the three levels of AI, revealing where most people are stuck and what a small percentage are doing to get ahead.
top_ideas.title: 99% of People Have No Idea What’s About to Happen With AI

top_ideas.summary: This video warns about AI's imminent impact on wealth and jobs, then outlines how to adapt, leverage AI, and capitalize on new market opportunities to avoid being replaced.
top_ideas.title: This is Your Last Chance to Get Rich (Before AI Replaces You)

top_ideas.summary: This video debunks the work-life balance myth, offering entrepreneurs a system to integrate work, family, health, and hobbies into their schedule.
top_ideas.title: How to Make Time For Everything (Seriously, everything)

top_ideas.summary: This video introduces beginners to Claude Code, addressing intimidation and time constraints by presenting an AI flywheel for leveraging AI to save time and make money.
top_ideas.title: The Ultimate Beginner's Guide to Claude Code

top_ideas.summary: This video demonstrates how to integrate AI into existing businesses to make them better, cheaper, faster, and less risky, dispelling common misconceptions about becoming an AI company.
top_ideas.title: How to Use AI in Your Business in 2026

top_ideas.summary: This video outlines five essential characteristics that define a 'perfect business' to help entrepreneurs identify and build more profitable ventures.
top_ideas.title: What Makes The Perfect Business (5 Things)

top_ideas.summary: This video defines what it means to be 'rich' by suggesting you are rich if having more money wouldn't change what you do.
top_ideas.title: When Are You Rich

top_ideas.summary: This video explains that self-respect is a daily practice, not an earned feeling, and how it dictates how others treat you.
top_ideas.title: Do This and People Will Instantly Respect You

top_ideas.summary: This video argues that effective content creation requires significant preparation time, not just filming, to ensure higher quality and impact.
top_ideas.title: HOLD What It Takes To Make Good Content

priority_move: Competitor pool over-indexed on no anchor this week (15 hits) and missed partner pressure. Ship two TCC pieces against partner pressure this week to own the lane.
